channel.title: On The Road - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!
channel.copyright: Copyright © Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion! 2026

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Since Beer America TV has split headquarters in both Rochester, New York and Savannah, Georgia, we thought we would highlight a local Rochester brewery in this week’s episode . Opening their doors in 1991, the Rohrbach Brewing Company can stake claim in being Rochester’s original craft brewery! Watch and listen as owner John Urlaub explains […]

The post Rohrbach Brewing Company, Ep. 180 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2011 Great American Beer Festival Highlights
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America had a great week at the Great American Beer Festival in Denver . Our primary reason for being there was to shoot the second installment of Beer America the TV series for Paul, and John was there once again as a judge and Brewers Association Board member. Neither of us had a lot […]

The post 2011 Great American Beer Festival Highlights first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Cooperstown Brewing Company – Ep. 76
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
When you think of Cooperstown, New York, you most certainly think of the Baseball Hall of Fame, and, for beer lovers, Brewery Ommegang. But there is another hidden treasure just a few miles down the road for craft beer lovers, and thats the Cooperstown Brewing Company. Founded in 1994, their baseball themed beers are the […]

The post Cooperstown Brewing Company – Ep. 76 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Savannah Brewfest – Ep. 70
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
The first annual Savannah Craft Brewfest took place Labor Day of 2008, and it was a hugely successful event – remember folks, we’re in Savannah, GA, things get here a little slower then the rest of the country. Regardless, it was so successful they’re doing it again this year on September 4th and 5th, 2009 […]

The post Savannah Brewfest – Ep. 70 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: A Candid Conversation with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver – Ep. 59
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
We all know Garrett Oliver is the best dressed man in the brewing business, but he’s also the brewer of some pretty great beers as well . As Brewmaster of the Brooklyn Brewery, Garrett knows quite a bit about American Craft beer as well as food. We caught up with him at the Craft Brewers […]

The post A Candid Conversation with Brooklyn Brewery’s Garrett Oliver – Ep. 59 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Bob Cannon, Boston Brewery, Ep.57
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
You might not know his name, but if you’ve seen any commercials about Sam Adams, you’ve certainly seen his face . Bob Cannon is a brewer at the Boston Beer Company and has somewhat of a cult following in New England. He was nice enough to give Beer America TV a few minutes of his […]

The post Interview with Bob Cannon, Boston Brewery, Ep.57 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Interview with Jim Koch, Boston Beer Company – Ep. 56
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Our recent trip to the Craft Brewers Conference was a blast, and we had the opportunity to interview plenty of brewers. This week we start off with the owner of the largest American owned brewery, the one and only Jim Koch from the Boston Beer Company . He’s got plenty to say, and you’ll love […]

The post Interview with Jim Koch, Boston Beer Company – Ep. 56 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Sam Calagione Cooks With Beer
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
What do mussels and steak have in common? Beer! Sam Calagione of Dogfish Head shows us the versatility of American Craft beer by using it as an ingredient in food . Produced by Paul Leone for Farmers Almanac TV, Sam shows you 2 dishes that are easy for anyone to make at home. After all: […]

The post Sam Calagione Cooks With Beer first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
